chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 1280 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Petitioner Muhammad Furqan present in person. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- The petitioner has been heard. He submits that he is Junior School Teacher BPS-15 and is regularly attending the School in Jhudo Town but the ASI Imdad Arain and other local police officials are causing harassment to him. He further submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition if appropriate direction is given to the official respondents including ASI Imdad Arain not to harass the petitioner and provide protection. Learned A.A.G. and A.P.G. are present in Court in other cases waive notice of this petition and submit that they will ensure that the official Respondents would act in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with the direction respondents No.9 and 10 to provide protection to the petitioner of his life and property but in accordance with law. Copy of this order be sent to SSP Mirpurkhas, A.P.G. and A.A.G for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE A.
